# AVAudioEngineManualRenderingMode.realtime

**Case**

An engine that operates under real-time constraints and doesn’t make blocking calls while rendering.

## Declaration

```swift
case realtime
```

## Discussion

You can only use the block-based render mechanism in this mode. See [doc://com.apple.avfaudio/documentation/AVFAudio/AVAudioEngine/manualRenderingBlock].

## Constants

- **AVAudioEngineManualRenderingMode.offline**: An engine that operates in an offline mode.
